arts.sum: Millwall are considering Walsall’s Mat Sadler for their managerial position but Northampton Town are also keen, as per… The post Millwall consider 39-year-old as Neil Harris replacement, League One club also keen appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Neil Harris’ return to Millwall was a success story - yet again he leaves on his own terms
arts.sum: Young players take time to develop and it is no secret that Serbian striker Ivanovic, a £3million club record signing at the end of the summer transfer window from Vojvodina, and Kelly, a long-term target as his Celtic deal ran down, were not ones that Harris were clamouring for. At the time of Harris’ exit being confirmed, only Leeds United (59) and Middlesbrough (55) had banked more points than Millwall (51) since he took over the head coach reins.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick makes Finn Azaz Middlesbrough importance point as star man bags award
arts.sum: On the award win, and Azaz’s importance to Boro, Carrick said: “He's important because of his performances. For Azaz, the award is symptomatic of a player who has really stepped up for Boro in recent weeks, with the addition of the end product in terms of goals and assists the key difference between a player who was otherwise playing as well early on in the season without the reward.

arts.ttl: Preview: Middlesbrough vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Middlesbrough and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Anfernee Dijksteel's Middlesrough contract situation dilemma after uplifting season - Boro panel
arts.sum: Our panel this week consists of Youtuber and talkSport journalist Phil Spencer, Boro Breakdown co-host Dana Malt, Boropolis co-founder Chris Cassidy and Twe12th Man member John Donovan. Anfernee Dijksteel is enjoying a season of career renaissance at Middlesbrough this term, having looked so likely to leave the club in the summer.

arts.ttl: More Middlesbrough illness woe ahead of Millwall as Aidan Morris return timeframe hope set
arts.sum: “We’ve still got a bit of illness knocking about the place actually,” Carrick said when asked for a fitness update ahead of Millwall. Middlesbrough face an anxious wait ahead of Saturday to see whether key players Dael Fry and Riley McGree will be available to play against Millwall, with the pair the latest to succumb to Boro ’s illness woe.
